source_jobs.title: Manager, Financial Planning & Analysis
source_jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><p class="ignore-global-css" style="margin: 0in;"><span style="font-size: 12pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; color: black;">At PBI-Gordon Companies, and our subsidiaries PBI-Gordon Corporation, Pegasus Laboratories, and PetAg, Inc, our priority is people, pets, and the places they go.&nbsp; As employee owners, we support each other in building our careers as well as our companies.&nbsp; Our foundation is rooted in integrity, innovation, partnership, and pride. Come grow with us!</span></p></div><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Position Summary</strong></span></p>
<p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun" data-ccp-charstyle-defn="{&quot;ObjectId&quot;:&quot;ac0262f4-8a9e-5820-b908-2d943c5f7113|1&quot;,&quot;ClassId&quot;:1073872969,&quot;Properties&quot;:[201342446,&quot;1&quot;,201342447,&quot;5&quot;,201342448,&quot;1&quot;,201342449,&quot;1&quot;,469777841,&quot;Calibri&quot;,469777842,&quot;Arial&quot;,469777843,&quot;Calibri&quot;,469777844,&quot;Calibri&quot;,201341986,&quot;1&quot;,469769226,&quot;Calibri,Arial&quot;,268442635,&quot;22&quot;,469775450,&quot;normaltextrun&quot;,201340122,&quot;1&quot;,134233614,&quot;true&quot;,469778129,&quot;normaltextrun&quot;,335572020,&quot;1&quot;,469778324,&quot;Default Paragraph Font&quot;]}">This Manager-level individual contributor role serves as a</span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">n</span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">&nbsp; FP&amp;A partner and </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">provides </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">close support to the Senior Manager, Financial Planning &amp; Analysis, </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">but performing&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun"> assigned subsidiary, departmental, and cross-functional planning and analysis workstreams that inform business performance, strategic planning, </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">and </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">resource allocation</span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">.</span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">, The position is responsible for managing budgeting, forecasting, long-range planning inputs, financial modeling, performance reporting, and business case analysis for assigned areas while developing leadership-ready insights and recommendations. While the role may have the potential to supervise others in the future, </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">the</span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun"> primary focus is project leadership, process ownership, analytical rigor, stakeholder influence, and execution. The role requires a proactive professional who </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">demonstrates</span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun"> initiative, strategic thinking, sound judgment, and the ability to </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">identify</span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun"> risks, opportunities, and recommendations that support company </span><span data-ccp-charstyle="normaltextrun">objectives</spa
